protect.text: SafeNet protects your child by monitoring their online activity and sending you alerts if we detect any suspicious or harmful behavior, such as cyberbullying or grooming attempts. Don't worry, all messages and content are completely private and secure, and nothing is ever stored or transmitted - your child's safety and privacy are our top priority. If you have any concerns or questions, I'm here to help and support you every step of the way.

honeytrap.text: A honey trap is when someone, often an adult, pretends to be a friend or someone your child trusts online, but their real intention is to manipulate or harm them. This can be very scary, but don't worry, SafeNet is here to help protect your child from these kinds of dangers. Would you like me to explain more about how we keep your child safe, sweetie?

threat.text: When I detect a threat, I immediately send an alert to you, the parent, so you can take action to protect your child, and don't worry, all messages are completely private and secure, and never stored or transmitted. I'm here to support you every step of the way, and if you need help understanding the alert or what to do next, just let me know. Would you like me to walk you through the alert process in more detail, sweetie?

privacy.text: Your child's privacy is completely protected, and I want to reassure you that any information or messages we detect are only used to keep them safe, and are never stored or shared with anyone. You can trust that SafeNet is a safe and confidential space for your child. If you have any concerns or questions, please don't hesitate to ask, I'm here to help and support you.

howuse.text: To use SafeNet, simply download and install the app on your child's device, then follow the prompts to set up their profile and customize the safety settings to suit your family's needs. Don't worry, I'm here to guide you through the process, and remember, all messages and content are completely private and never stored or transmitted. If you need help with setup or have any questions, I'm here to assist you every step of the way, with a warm and caring support.

protect.text: SafeNet yi ta sirhelela n'wana wa wena hi ku tlhava swihlamariso swa vukomeri, naswona swi ta ku nyika wena vutivi loko ku hundza swiphiwo swa vukomeri. Ndza ku kurisa, ndza ta ku Combela ku ku pfuna.
